lint.observation: No ESLint warnings or errors (deprecation notice only)

appliedUpdates.description: Added project-setup patterns: modern Next.js 15.5.15 with React 19.2.4 at cutting edge, Supabase CLI for cloud migrations, UUID seeding with deterministic values for referential integrity
Added auth patterns: Supabase SSR with createServerClient/createBrowserClient, protectedPrefixes for route protection, redirectTo parameter for post-auth redirects, useTransition for async form state
Added navigation patterns: isActive() helper for sub-route matching, mobile hamburger menu with aria attributes, (protected) route group for auth enforcement
Added testing patterns: React Testing Library with accessible queries, @testing-library/jest-dom matchers via vitest.setup.ts, TDD approach with tests before implementation

rejectedObservations.note: This is expected behavior - features build on each other

rejectedObservations.observation: Empty state message uses 'No plans yet' instead of 'No transfer plans yet'
rejectedObservations.note: Minor semantic difference, does not affect functionality

rejectedObservations.observation: Dark mode support via dark: prefixed classes

reviewDetails.summary: Next.js 15 project fully configured with TypeScript strict mode, Tailwind CSS v4, Supabase SSR clients, 9 database tables with RLS, and comprehensive seed data (8 CC-to-university paths, 94 courses, 4 playbooks).

Hero section with CareerAC branding, AI-powered transfer planning messaging, failure recovery and community playbooks subheadline, and CTA button linking to /auth/signup. Fully responsive with Tailwind.

Complete email authentication with /auth/signup and /auth/signin pages (client-side validation), /auth/callback route, signout functionality, middleware protected routes, and SSR cookie session persistence.

Header with logo, nav links (Dashboard, New Plan, Playbooks), user email display, signout button, active route highlighting, mobile hamburger menu, and custom 404 page. Protected routes via (protected) group.
Dashboard at /dashboard with empty state showing 'No plans yet' message and CTA button linking to /plan/new. Protected route with proper layout.
